---
name: "🚀 Feature Request"
about: "Suggest an improvement, new diagnostic module, or hardware telemetry feature"
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: ["enhancement", "feature-request"]
assignees: []
---

## 💡 Describe the Proposed Feature
What new feature or diagnostic tool are you requesting? Give a detailed overview.

## 🎯 What Problem Does This Solve?
How does this help technicians, system builders, or data recovery experts? Explain the use case.

## 🛠️ Proposed Implementation Details
If you have ideas on how to build this (such as specific WMI classes to query, `kernel32.dll` API calls to invoke, or UI/UX mockups), please share them!

## ❓ Alternative Solutions
Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you have considered.
